codeReview.summary: The baseline commit delivers the requested BETTER-blue token reset, CVA-based layout/typography primitives, approved redesign dependencies, and a poster-like hero foundation without regressing the typed narrative/content surfaces. I did not find a blocking functional regression in the reviewed diff, but there is one dependency hygiene issue worth fixing.

issues.description: `cn()` imports `clsx` directly, but this commit never declares `clsx` in `package.json` (only `class-variance-authority`, `motion`, and `tailwind-merge` are added at `package.json:13-20`). The code currently works only because `class-variance-authority` happens to hoist `clsx` transitively, which makes the baseline brittle to dependency tree changes or stricter installers.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker's `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` overstates adherence to `frontend-experience-worker`. The skill requires reviewing reference screenshots before hero/landing changes and writing failing tests first, but the transcript shows implementation started before any new test files were created and does not show any screenshot files being read.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker `20841a70-1ede-4480-9e52-927c94e3de2e`: first baseline `npm run test` appears at offset 3088, while the first created test file (`src/lib/__tests__/utils.test.ts`) appears much later at offset 13481. The transcript contains a broad `Glob` for `**/.factory/research/**` (offset 4567), but direct reads of `.factory/research/screenshots/tradebetter-hero.png` and `.factory/research/screenshots/radiant-hero.png` are absent (`-1` when searched), despite those screenshot assets already being documented in `.factory/library/environment.md`.

summary: Pass. The feature establishes the redesign baseline successfully and preserves the existing typed content model, with one non-blocking issue: `src/lib/utils.ts` relies on undeclared direct dependency `clsx`. Also surface that the handoff overstated skill-procedure adherence because the transcript does not show screenshot review or test-first ordering.
